privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for weasis_env apply_spatial_filter task by verifying that the data is a real multi-frame X-Ray Angiography sample downloaded from Rubo Medical (0002.DCM), and confirming the expected output paths and filter keyword explicitly match the task description and export script.
